posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to invite everyone to our webinar: ‘Automating Accounting Practice with monday’.

Key takeaways:

  • Automated work creation for your whole client base.
  • Client budget tracking and staff KPIs.
  • Capacity planning for 12 months.
  • 360 view of each client and staff.
  • Preview of a tailored accounting solution - the system your staff will want to use!

Thu, 14th March 12pm
RSVP link

Elena K
Founder @ Kick Consulting
